pokemon:frigibax.name: Frigibax
pokemon:frigibax.summary: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.
This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.

pokemon:arctibax.name: Arctibax
pokemon:arctibax.summary: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.
It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

pokemon:baxcalibur.name: Baxcalibur
pokemon:baxcalibur.summary: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.
